textByHash.8b8d1277c2fb39d3b455efcb1e0bf8ec2cd6bd50: Did you think I wouldn't find you?
textByHash.d779b9b987e572dafd28e62741b0df42aa111aab: Who are you, human? Speak now, and do so with haste, for you stand before the mighty Jhallan!
textByHash.5100901f37baf08c28db6160b68ea3169efe9d1b: A human, seeking a Mahjarrat? Why? What would a meaningless being like you want with me?
textByHash.7a683f53318c0966e2fd9843e0cea866388c4b1e: You know of the Ghorrock Crest? How?
textByHash.6331e0b92b6e5e2b86f09c95b63a0f5d1b924403: A story of lies, no doubt. I don't know how you came to stand before me, human, but you are clearly no friend of mine. Leave now, before I bring down the might of the Ruinous Powers on you!
textByHash.a2700b13f8304a0ddf4a8f0b94f01aaed9d937d5: Then let him come! I am a faithful servant of the Empty Lord. I will not be intimidated by a pathetic human like you.
